assertions.text: AreaExtra type includes ContextMenuExtra in the union
assertions.evidence: `type AreaExtra = ReactArea2D<Schemes> | ContextMenuExtra | MinimapExtra;` — all extras present.

assertions.text: AreaExtra type includes MinimapExtra in the union
assertions.evidence: MinimapExtra included in the AreaExtra union.

assertions.text: render.addPreset(Presets.contextMenu.setup()) is called to register context menu rendering
assertions.evidence: `ReactPresets.contextMenu.setup()` registered via render.addPreset (using ReactPresets alias instead of Presets — same thing).

assertions.text: Uses HistoryExtensions.keyboard(history) for keybindings rather than a manual addEventListener
assertions.evidence: Implements a manual `document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)` instead of calling `HistoryExtensions.keyboard(history)`. The manual implementation is more verbose, adds its own cleanup concern, and doesn't use the canonical API. Also imports `HistoryActions` as a generic type which may not be a valid Rete v2 export.

assertions.text: Context menu uses correct nested category format with 'Data' and 'Sink' subcategories
